summary: A Go-based CLI tool for migrating, detecting, and running Goss assertions with OpenTelemetry tracing and Kubernetes support.
concerns: Uncommitted changes in working directory (2 modified, 1 staged, 1 untracked)
Potential tight coupling between runner and goss migration logic
Plugin directory lacks language specification indicating possible mixed-language complexity
suggestions: Commit or stash the current working directory changes to maintain a clean state
Review OpenTelemetry integration for performance overhead in assertion runner
Document plugin interface and expected behaviors
Consider abstracting the goss translator behind an interface to support future migration sources
